author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Community Week - Team vs Community Sign Ups

Think you have what it takes to take on the creators of Star Atlas? 

On July 31, during Community Week, we’re hosting a Team vs. Community event where selected community teams will face off against the ATMTA team. Every community win unlocks prizes for both the players and the audience, so be sure to cheer on your fellow community members!  

We’re accepting 10 team submissions and giving priority to one team from each major Star Atlas guild.

 | Submit your roster here: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeXlz_YBoqiBljKXK9VHS1Kk_7oDZPw3-Ljtadf4IbHlCLJ-A/viewform
